beaches.name: Bora Bora, French Polynesia
beaches.description: An island known for its stunning turquoise waters and luxurious overwater bungalows.

beaches.name: Copacabana Beach, Brazil
beaches.description: A famous beach in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, with a vibrant atmosphere and scenic views.

beaches.name: Maldives Atoll
beaches.description: Crystal-clear lagoons surrounded by white-sand beaches and colourful coral reefs.

temples.name: Angkor Wat, Cambodia
temples.description: A UNESCO World Heritage site and the largest religious monument in the world.

temples.name: Taj Mahal, India
temples.description: An iconic symbol of love and a masterpiece of Mughal architecture in Agra.

temples.name: Senso-ji Temple, Japan
temples.description: Tokyo's oldest and most significant Buddhist temple, set in the Asakusa district.

cities.name: Sydney, Australia
cities.description: A vibrant city known for its iconic landmarks like the Sydney Opera House and Harbour Bridge.

cities.name: Melbourne, Australia
cities.description: A cultural hub famous for its arts, food, diverse neighbourhoods, and laneways.

cities.name: Tokyo, Japan
cities.description: A thriving metropolis blending cutting-edge modernity with deep-rooted tradition.

cities.name: Kyoto, Japan
cities.description: Known for its historic temples, gardens, traditional tea houses, and geisha culture.

cities.name: Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
cities.description: A lively city famed for Carnival, Christ the Redeemer, and iconic Copacabana beach.

cities.name: São Paulo, Brazil
cities.description: The financial hub of South America, bursting with diverse culture, arts, and nightlife.
